onboarding.title: Welcome
onboarding.subtitle: Set your initial language and level.

workspace.title: Study tools in one place
workspace.subtitle: Switch between materials, writing practice, and tutor chat without jumping across separate utility pages.

descriptions.materials: Upload, organize, and review your source materials in a shared workspace.
descriptions.writing: Draft, analyze, and revise writing with the same layout and navigation flow.
descriptions.chat: Practice natural conversation with the preview tutor without leaving the workspace.

today.title: Today's Lesson
today.generateDescription: Start with a fresh lesson or generate a new one around a focused topic.
today.vocabularyDescription: Review today's words as compact study cards instead of a long checklist.

progressCenter.title: Learning analytics and history
progressCenter.subtitle: Track RPG growth, compare language progress, and revisit mistakes or past lessons from one central workspace.

tabDescriptions.mistakes: Retry difficult questions and move mastered mistakes out of the way.
tabDescriptions.review: Manage spaced repetition reviews and keep due items under control.
tabDescriptions.history: Browse past lessons, imports, and processing history without leaving the progress center.

progressCenter.languageProgressDescription: A quick comparison of your current level, lesson completion, and accuracy across both learning tracks.
progressCenter.wordCardsDescription: Your collected cards stay visible here so progress feels cumulative over time.

archive.empty: No lessons found. Generate your first lesson to get started.
